entries.name: Survive the Crown's intake — a stranger in Crown custody at the Reach; what they decide you are decides whether you walk, work, or hang
The Crossing — ~8 million New Yorkers torn into Hethrun in one black second; what did it, and is there a way home?
Count Edmund wants the strangers dead — pressing the Crown for the authority to put the drift-come to the sword [clock 0/6]
Stonebay wants to own them — Ranulf's agents work the intake to buy or steal the strangers for the eastern markets [clock 0/6]
The Crown just wants the headache gone — indifferent to your fate, but it will NOT let Stonebay have you, nor wear Edmund's massacre
Find your people — the others the Crossing scattered across the realm; whoever you're looking for
Conflated with the Stonebay 'brigands' — the PC was taken among men the Crown calls rebels and Stonebay calls lawful tithe-men; that dispute colors what the PC is taken to be
Mossdrowen conscripts — the wood-wardens want bodies for the failing frontier; a hard road out of Crown custody
